execution:
Direct via Shopify Admin MCP (graphql_mutation articleUpdate) — appended a `

Related reading

    ...
` section to each of the 3 new pillar articles. Strengthens internal linking density within the mattress-buying-guide cluster.
cms_hygiene: Followed the established pattern from scripts/seo-article-cleanup.mjs: fetched the canonical body from Shopify Admin API (rather than re-sending the locally-cached source HTML, which would have clobbered any whitespace normalization Shopify applied at create-time), appended the new section, then articleUpdate. Verified via re-fetch — the Related reading section is present in the canonical body served by Shopify.
seo_impact: Builds out the link graph between the 3 new pillar articles + the existing 4 referenced pillar articles. Cross-linking pillar pages within the same topical cluster signals topical authority to Google + distributes PageRank across the cluster. Each link is to an existing live URL (verified via MCP query before applying).
out_of_scope: Did NOT modify the existing 6 pillar articles to add reverse links pointing to the new 3 (would require editing merchant-authored content; out of scope for this session). A future merchant-authored editorial pass should add 'See also' links to the new pillar articles from any topically-relevant older articles.
